prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为约23928名→25270名→64617名（异常断档）→43129名→44928名。排除2023年断档异常值后，近两年位次在43000–45000区间波动 ，2025年基准位次约44928名，较2024年后移约1800名，呈小幅后移趋势；该校在河北省物理类招生计划：2021年110人、2022年109人、2023年109人、2024年14 5人、2025年146人、2026年152人。2026年较2025年扩招6人（+4.1%），连续三年扩招，招生规模持续扩大，竞争压力略有缓解，位次倾向于后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 云南 大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名从2021年第83名持续上升至2025年第69名、2026年第71名，整体处于全国70–80名区间，属于中上游211层次，近年排名稳中 有升；2025年声誉评价偏负面，主要因就业数据引发关注；抖音热度排名第62位，评价"一般"，综合热度约52.5万，短视频平台曝光度中等偏低，未见明显投档 断档记录。整体声誉中性偏弱，对报考热度影响有限；第五轮学科评估中，民族学A+、生态学A、统计学A-为代表性优势学科。物理类招生专业中，统计学（A- ）、生态学（A）、计算机类、电子信息类等与优势学科关联紧密，对相关方向考生有一定吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专业社会热度 持续高热（2024年热指数76–77），为物理类主要招生方向，有利于吸引考生报考；河北省2026年普通高考总人数约60.98万，较2025年（约60.68万）略有增加，按历史比例估算 物理类约36.5万人，竞争略加剧，本科批物理类从2021年412分升至2025年459分，整体呈上升趋势；云南大学位于云南省昆明市，距河北省较 远，属于跨省招生。该校在河北省招生占比相对较小（物理类约占总计划一定比例），地域偏好因素对报考影响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次44928名、2026年扩 招4.1%（位次后移约1100名的主驱动）、软科排名稳中有升（微弱吸引力）、本省考生略增（竞争略加剧）及声誉中性偏弱等因素，经小幅修正 后预测2026年物理类最低位次约45986名，区间45486–46486名。扩招是位次后移的最关键因素，考生规模增加和排名上升有轻微抵消作用。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 23928 → 25270 → 64617 (abnormal gap) → 43129 → 44928. Excluding the 2023 gap anomaly, rankings in the past two years fluctuated within the 43000–45000 range. The 2025 baseline ranking is approximately 44928, shifting back by about 1800 positions compared to 2024, showing a slight backward trend. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Hebei Province: 110 in 2021, 109 in 2022, 109 in 2023, 145 in 2024, 146 in 2025, and 152 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees an increase of 6 students (+4.1%), with three consecutive years of expansion, leading to a continuously growing enrollment scale, slightly easing competition pressure and favoring a backward shift in rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yunnan University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Ranking has steadily risen from 83rd in 2021 to 69th in 2025 and 71st in 2026, overall ranking in the national 70–80 range, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities, with stable or slightly rising rankings in recent years. In 2025, the reputation evaluation was slightly negative, mainly due to employment data attracting attention. Douyin popularity ranking is 62nd, with an evaluation of 'average,' and a comprehensive popularity of about 525,000, indicating medium-low exposure on short video platforms, with no obvious filing gaps recorded. Overall reputation is neutral to slightly weak, with limited impact on application enthusiasm. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Ethnology (A+), Ecology (A), and Statistics (A-) are representative advantageous disciplines. Among Physics Category enrollment majors, Statistics (A-), Ecology (A), Computer Science, and Electronic Information are closely related to advantageous disciplines, attracting some candidates interested in related directions.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular (2024 heat index 76–77), serving as the main enrollment directions for Physics Category, which helps attract candidates. The total number of Hebei Province general college entrance examination candidates in 2026 is approximately 609,800, slightly increasing from about 606,800 in 2025. Estimated by historical proportion, Physics Category candidates are about 365,000, with slightly intensified competition. The undergraduate batch Physics Category line has risen from 412 in 2021 to 459 in 2025, showing an overall upward trend. Yunnan University is located in Kunming City, Yunnan Province, far from Hebei Province, making it a cross-provincial enrollment. The university's enrollment proportion in Hebei is relatively small (Physics Category accounts for a certain proportion of the total plan), and regional preference factors have a neutral impact on application enthusiasm.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 44928, the 2026 enrollment expansion of 4.1% (main driver shifting rankings back by about 1100 positions), stable or slightly rising Soft Science rankings (weak attraction), a slight increase in local candidates (slightly intensified competition), and neutral to slightly weak reputation, after minor adjustments, the predicted 2026 Physics Category minimum ranking is approximately 45986, with a range of 45486–46486. Enrollment expansion is the most critical factor for the backward shift in rankings, while the increase in candidate numbers and ranking rise have a slight offsetting effect.

If the ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<45486), prioritize sprinting for top Tier 1 majors; if the ranking is close to the upper limit (>46486), it is advisable to focus on stable Tier 2 majors.

prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年历史类最低位次分别为约5781名→4579名→13289名（异常断档）→4300名→5759名。排除2023年断档异常值后，近四年位次在4300–5800区间波动，2025 年基准位次约5759名，较2024年后移约1459名，呈明显后移趋势；该校在河北省历史类招生计划：2021年32人、2022年39人、2023年40人、2024年36人、2025年 33人、2026年37人。2026年较2025年扩招4人（+12.1%），扩招幅度较大，竞争压力明显缓解，位次倾向于后移。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 云南大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳居全国70–80名区间，2026年第71名，属于中上游211层次，对历史类考生有稳定的品牌吸引力；2025年声誉评价偏负面（就业数据问题 ），抖音热度排名第62位、评价"一般"，整体曝光度中等偏低；未见投档断档记录。声誉因素对历史类报考影响中性偏弱；第五轮学科评估中，民族学A+为云南 大学最强学科，与历史类招生专业中的民族学直接对应；生态学A、统计学A-虽偏理科但对学校整体学术声誉有提升作用。历史类招生专业中的法学、汉语言文学、新闻学等虽未 获A类评级，但受益于学校整体211平台。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 法学（分化观望）、汉语言文学（推荐）、新闻传播（明显劝退）等历史类主要专业方向热度分化明显；师范/ 教育类呈分化观望。河北省2026年普通高考总人数约60.98万，按历史比例估算历史类约24.5万人，较2025年（24.37万）略有增加，竞争略加剧；省控线历史类本科批从2021年45 4分升至2025年477分，整体上升；云南大学位于昆明市，距河北省较远，属于跨省招生。该校在河北省历史类招生计划占比较小（30余人），地域偏好对报考影 响中性。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次5759名、2026年扩招12.1%（位次后移约419名的主驱动）、软科排名稳中有升、本省历史类考生略增及声誉中性偏弱等因素，经小幅修正后预测2026年历史类最低位次约6208名，区间5708–6708名。扩招是位次后移的最关键因素，考生规模增加有轻微抵消作用。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category were approximately 5781 → 4579 → 13289 (abnormal gap) → 4300 → 5759. Excluding the 2023 gap anomaly, the rankings over the past four years fluctuated within the 4300–5800 range. The 2025 baseline ranking is approximately 5759, shifting back by about 1459 places compared to 2024, showing a clear backward trend. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hebei Province: 32 in 2021, 39 in 2022, 40 in 2023, 36 in 2024, 33 in 2025, and 37 in 2026. Compared to 2025, 2026 sees an increase of 4 students (+12.1%), a relatively large expansion, significantly easing competition pressure and favoring a backward shift in rankings.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Yunnan University is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the Soft Science China University Rankings, it has consistently ranked in the 70–80 range nationally in recent years, ranking 71st in 2026, placing it in the mid-to-upper tier of 211 universities, offering stable brand appeal to History Category applicants. In 2025, its reputation evaluation was somewhat negative (due to employment data issues), with a Douyin popularity ranking of 62nd and a rating of 'average,' indicating moderately low overall exposure. No records of admission gaps were observed. The impact of reputation on History Category applications is neutral to weak. In the fifth round of discipline evaluations, Ethnology (A+) is Yunnan University's strongest discipline, directly corresponding to the Ethnology major in the History Category enrollment. Ecology (A) and Statistics (A-), though more science-oriented, enhance the university's overall academic reputation. Although majors like Law, Chinese Language and Literature, and Journalism in the History Category did not receive A-level ratings, they benefit from the university's overall 211 platform.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Geography
专业热度与地域.text: Major directions in History Category show clear divergence in popularity: Law (diverging and wait-and-see), Chinese Language and Literature (recommended), and Journalism and Communication (clearly discouraged). Teacher training/education categories show divergence and wait-and-see. In 2026, the total number of regular college entrance exam takers in Hebei Province is approximately 609,800, with an estimated 245,000 in the History Category based on historical proportions, a slight increase from 2025 (243,700), slightly intensifying competition. The provincial control line for the History Category undergraduate batch rose from 454 in 2021 to 477 in 2025, showing an overall upward trend. Yunnan University is located in Kunming, far from Hebei Province, making it a cross-provincial enrollment. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Hebei Province accounts for a small proportion (over 30 students), so geographic preference has a neutral impact on applications.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 5759, the 12.1% enrollment expansion in 2026 (driving a backward shift of about 419 places), the stable and slightly rising Soft Science ranking, a slight increase in local History Category examinees, and a neutral to slightly weak reputation, after minor corrections, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 6208, with a range of 5708–6708. The enrollment expansion is the most critical factor for the backward shift in ranking, while the increase in examinee numbers has a slight offsetting effect.
